title: stelis gigantea
intro: Stelis gigantea is a species of orchid, commonly known as the giant Stelis, which is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Stelis gigantea lie in its roots, which contain flavonoids and alkaloids, making it useful in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis gigantea include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. Stelis gigantea is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be prepared by boiling the roots in water or mixing them with other medicinal plants.
